scope: Migration of the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (blogs, posts, pages, comments), matching internal/connectors/blogger's exact routing table. Blogger's full documented API surface (page/post insert-update-delete, blog user info, page views, comment moderation) is out of scope until Pass B capability expansion; legacy itself is also read-only (Write always returns ErrUnsupportedOperation).

single-post fetch is a narrower case of the posts stream already covered
